{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323040019F447F28301DCDF8E7986"}"},"total":2328},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7079864625931895586","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错… 只是节奏 世界观 不够宏伟 很多地方写的不够激情… 望作者大大多加改进 顺便多多加更才是正道。 五星以勉励[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1648409536,"group_id":"7071799381732625443","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"随缘、随意、随心","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/+fzKQeEt7gPzU9pNIRcsU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/860f9229421f4421b9dcd23857641b13~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792343&x-signature=FUNw1nkfu%2FPV%2BPEN4B7%2Fy%2BhV8iE%3D","user_id":"3571762453","user_name":"爱看书的竹蜻蜓"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3571762453","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1736698866,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7071799381732625443","book_info":{"abstract":"一朝穿越，林殊来到一方玄幻世界，成为了圣地弟子，并且还是一方拍卖行少主。
　　开局获得一个拍卖系统，系统奖励千年寿元。
　　至此。
　　一个神级拍卖行崛起。
　　圣人，那只是我拍卖行用来看门而已！
　　大帝，也只是我拍卖行的高级打手！
